answers: Best apps: Audible (largest selection), Libby (free from library), Scribd (unlimited), Google Play Books.
Audiobooks vs reading: both are valid! Audiobooks are great for commuting, exercising, and multitasking.
Tips: start at 1x speed and gradually increase, try different narrators, and choose genres that work well in audio.
Free audiobooks: Libby (library card), LibriVox (public domain), and Spotify now has audiobooks in its catalog.
